---
title: "Celigo_Well_Level_Plots"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r print-platemap-conditions-labelled}
file_path <- file.choose()
Condition <- read.csv(file_path, check.names = FALSE)

Condition$Condition <- gsub("\\\\n", "\n", Condition$Condition)
p<-plate_plot(
  data = Condition,
  position = Well,
  value = Condition,
  plate_size = 96,
  plate_type = "round",
    title = "Example", 
  label = Condition,
  show_legend = FALSE,
  label_size = 1.1 ,
  title_size = 11,
  colour = c("#3CB371", "#6495ED", "#8A2BE2", "#EDC764", "#2BE28A", "#48D1CC",  "#BA55D3", "#D1484D", "#B33C47", "#CC7A33", "#66A9AB", "#5A8AC9", "#99CC66", "#CC6699", "#669C94", "#B35A66", "#9B84B3", "#CC7266"),
  scale = 1.4  ,
  legend_n_row = 5
)

    ggsave("Example.png", plot = p, width = 6, height = 4)
    
    plot(p)
```
